description_long: This is a tall, rectangular refrigerator with a classic two-door design, featuring a freezer compartment on top and a larger refrigerator compartment below. The exterior is finished in a matte, slightly worn silver or light gray color, with two vertical metallic handles on the right side of the doors. A small rectangular control panel or display is present on the upper left of the freezer door, and a piece of paper or note is attached to the lower door with a magnet. The sides and back are plain, with no visible vents or grilles, and the top is flat and unadorned. The refrigerator appears robust and functional, suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or service alleys.
description: A tall, silver two-door refrigerator with metallic handles, a small control panel, and a note attached to the front. The design is simple and utilitarian, with a matte finish and no visible vents.
description_view_0: Side view showing a plain, flat metallic surface with the two door handles visible on the right edge.
description_view_1: Front view displaying both doors, metallic handles, a small control panel on the upper left, and a note attached to the lower door.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0 but without visible handles; the door seam is visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a completely plain, flat metallic surface with no features or openings.
attribute_door_handle_style: Protruding vertical metallic handles mounted on the right edge of each door.
